"""
RetroDiff graphical abstract — CNS-tier (Cell Reports / Nat Commun / Sci Adv)
Pattern: Workflow (Pattern 1) — left-to-right pipeline with headline result
Layout: landscape 2:1, ~12×6 inches (1200×600 px at 100 dpi)
"""

import matplotlib as mpl
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import matplotlib.patheffects as pe
import numpy as np

# Font stack: Arial → Helvetica → DejaVu Sans → Liberation Sans
# Do NOT override per element — all text inherits from here.
mpl.rcParams.update({
    "font.family": "sans-serif",
    "font.sans-serif": ["Arial", "Helvetica", "DejaVu Sans", "Liberation Sans"],
    "svg.fonttype": "none",
    "pdf.fonttype": 42,
    "axes.spines.right": False,
    "axes.spines.top": False,
    "axes.linewidth": 0.8,
    "legend.frameon": False,
})

# ── Palette (cool family, reduced saturation, P1+P2 compliant) ──────────────
PALETTE = {
    "bg":          "#FFFFFF",
    "panel_bg":    "#F4F7FB",   # near-white blue tint for boxes
    "blue":        "#2B6CB0",   # primary signal — RetroDiff
    "blue_soft":   "#BDD7EE",   # soft fill for boxes
    "teal":        "#2C8C7C",   # retrieval mechanism
    "teal_soft":   "#B8DDD8",
    "amber":       "#B07D2F",   # baseline / comparison
    "amber_soft":  "#F3E3C5",
    "grey":        "#767676",
    "grey_light":  "#D8D8D8",
    "black":       "#1A1A2E",
    "headline":    "#2B6CB0",
}

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6), facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])

# ── Layout: 5 visual elements across a 2:1 canvas ───────────────────────────
# [Protein pocket] → [ChEMBL retrieval] → [RetroDiff decoder] → [Generated mol] → [Headline bar]
# We use axes coordinates for the diagram elements, plus one real axes for the bar chart.

ax_main = fig.add_axes([0, 0, 1, 1])  # full-canvas drawing surface
ax_main.set_xlim(0, 12)
ax_main.set_ylim(0, 6)
ax_main.axis("off")
ax_main.set_facecolor(PALETTE["bg"])

# ── Helper: rounded box with label ──────────────────────────────────────────
def draw_box(ax, cx, cy, w, h, label, sublabel, fill, edge, fontsize=9.5):
    box = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch(
        (cx - w/2, cy - h/2), w, h,
        boxstyle="round,pad=0.12",
        facecolor=fill, edgecolor=edge, linewidth=1.4,
        zorder=3,
    )
    ax.add_patch(box)
    ax.text(cx, cy + 0.12, label, ha="center", va="center",
            fontsize=fontsize, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"], zorder=4)
    if sublabel:
        ax.text(cx, cy - 0.38, sublabel, ha="center", va="center",
                fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["grey"], zorder=4)

def draw_arrow(ax, x0, x1, y, color, lw=2.0):
    ax.annotate("",
        xy=(x1, y), xytext=(x0, y),
        arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=color, lw=lw,
                        mutation_scale=14),
        zorder=2)

# ── Element 1: Protein binding pocket ───────────────────────────────────────
# Stylised pocket icon using a concave polygon
pocket_cx, pocket_cy = 1.35, 3.5
pocket_w, pocket_h = 1.55, 2.0

# Draw pocket as a U-shape (open top)
theta = np.linspace(np.pi, 2*np.pi, 60)
px = pocket_cx + 0.62 * np.cos(theta)
py = pocket_cy - 0.55 + 0.72 * np.sin(theta)
# Close the U at the top
px = np.concatenate([[pocket_cx - 0.62], px, [pocket_cx + 0.62]])
py = np.concatenate([[pocket_cy + 0.55], py, [pocket_cy + 0.55]])
ax_main.fill(px, py, color=PALETTE["teal_soft"], alpha=0.85, zorder=2)
ax_main.plot(px, py, color=PALETTE["teal"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=3)

# Small dots inside pocket = binding residues
for dx, dy in [(-0.25, -0.1), (0.0, -0.35), (0.25, -0.1), (-0.12, 0.18), (0.18, 0.22)]:
    ax_main.plot(pocket_cx + dx, pocket_cy + dy, "o",
                 color=PALETTE["teal"], markersize=5, zorder=4)

ax_main.text(pocket_cx, pocket_cy - 1.18, "Protein Pocket", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"])
ax_main.text(pocket_cx, pocket_cy - 1.52, "binding target", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["grey"])

# ── Arrow 1 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 2.18, 2.72, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 2: ChEMBL retrieval box ─────────────────────────────────────────
draw_box(ax_main, 3.35, 3.5, 1.55, 1.85,
         "ChEMBL", "ECFP4 top-k retrieval",
         PALETTE["teal_soft"], PALETTE["teal"], fontsize=9.5)

# Small molecule icons inside the box (3 hexagons)
for i, (dx, dy) in enumerate([(-0.38, -0.05), (0.0, 0.18), (0.38, -0.05)]):
    hx = 3.35 + dx
    hy = 3.5 + dy - 0.28
    hex_pts = [(hx + 0.18*np.cos(np.pi/6 + k*np.pi/3),
                hy + 0.18*np.sin(np.pi/6 + k*np.pi/3)) for k in range(6)]
    hex_pts.append(hex_pts[0])
    hxs, hys = zip(*hex_pts)
    ax_main.fill(hxs, hys, color=PALETTE["teal"], alpha=0.35, zorder=4)
    ax_main.plot(hxs, hys, color=PALETTE["teal"], linewidth=1.0, zorder=5)

# ── Arrow 2 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 4.18, 4.72, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 3: RetroDiff decoder (hero box) ──────────────────────────────────
# Larger box — the method itself
rd_cx, rd_cy = 5.85, 3.5
rd_w, rd_h = 2.0, 2.2
box_rd = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch(
    (rd_cx - rd_w/2, rd_cy - rd_h/2), rd_w, rd_h,
    boxstyle="round,pad=0.15",
    facecolor=PALETTE["blue_soft"], edgecolor=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.2,
    zorder=3,
)
ax_main.add_patch(box_rd)
ax_main.text(rd_cx, rd_cy + 0.55, "RetroDiff", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=12, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["blue"], zorder=4)
ax_main.text(rd_cx, rd_cy + 0.12, "Retrieval-Augmented", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=8, color=PALETTE["black"], zorder=4)
ax_main.text(rd_cx, rd_cy - 0.18, "Diffusion Decoder", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=8, color=PALETTE["black"], zorder=4)

# Diffusion noise squiggle (stylised)
t = np.linspace(0, 2*np.pi, 80)
noise_x = rd_cx - 0.55 + 1.1 * (t / (2*np.pi))
noise_y = rd_cy - 0.62 + 0.18 * np.sin(4*t) * np.exp(-0.3*t)
ax_main.plot(noise_x, noise_y, color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=1.5,
             alpha=0.7, zorder=4)
ax_main.annotate("", xy=(noise_x[-1], noise_y[-1]),
                 xytext=(noise_x[-4], noise_y[-4]),
                 arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=PALETTE["blue"],
                                 lw=1.2, mutation_scale=8), zorder=5)

# ── Arrow 3 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 6.92, 7.42, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 4: Generated molecule ────────────────────────────────────────────
mol_cx, mol_cy = 8.2, 3.5
# Draw a stylised molecule (benzene ring + substituent)
ring_r = 0.38
for k in range(6):
    a0 = np.pi/6 + k * np.pi/3
    a1 = np.pi/6 + (k+1) * np.pi/3
    ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r*np.cos(a0), mol_cx + ring_r*np.cos(a1)],
                 [mol_cy + ring_r*np.sin(a0), mol_cy + ring_r*np.sin(a1)],
                 color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.2, zorder=4)
# Alternating double bonds (inner ring)
inner_r = 0.22
for k in range(0, 6, 2):
    a0 = np.pi/6 + k * np.pi/3
    a1 = np.pi/6 + (k+1) * np.pi/3
    ax_main.plot([mol_cx + inner_r*np.cos(a0), mol_cx + inner_r*np.cos(a1)],
                 [mol_cy + inner_r*np.sin(a0), mol_cy + inner_r*np.sin(a1)],
                 color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=1.2, alpha=0.6, zorder=4)
# Substituent chain
ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r, mol_cx + ring_r + 0.32],
             [mol_cy, mol_cy + 0.28], color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=4)
ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r + 0.32, mol_cx + ring_r + 0.64],
             [mol_cy + 0.28, mol_cy], color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=4)
# OH group
ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r, mol_cx + ring_r + 0.32],
             [mol_cy, mol_cy - 0.30], color=PALETTE["teal"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=4)
ax_main.text(mol_cx + ring_r + 0.38, mol_cy - 0.38, "OH",
             fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["teal"], fontweight="bold", zorder=5)

ax_main.text(mol_cx, mol_cy - 0.95, "Generated Molecule", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"])
ax_main.text(mol_cx, mol_cy - 1.28, "novel drug candidate", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["grey"])

# ── Arrow 4 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 8.98, 9.42, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 5: Headline result bar chart ─────────────────────────────────────
ax_bar = fig.add_axes([0.815, 0.22, 0.165, 0.58])
ax_bar.set_facecolor(PALETTE["bg"])

methods = ["Baseline\nDiffusion", "RetroDiff"]
hit_rates = [1.0, 2.0]   # relative; RetroDiff doubles hit rate
colors = [PALETTE["grey_light"], PALETTE["blue"]]
bars = ax_bar.bar(methods, hit_rates, color=colors, width=0.55,
                  edgecolor=[PALETTE["grey"], PALETTE["blue"]], linewidth=1.2)

# Annotate the gain
ax_bar.annotate("", xy=(1, 2.0), xytext=(1, 1.0),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=PALETTE["blue"],
                                lw=1.4, mutation_scale=10))
ax_bar.text(1.28, 1.5, "×2", fontsize=11, fontweight="bold",
            color=PALETTE["blue"], va="center")

ax_bar.set_ylim(0, 2.45)
ax_bar.set_ylabel("Hit Rate (rel.)", fontsize=8, color=PALETTE["grey"])
ax_bar.set_title("Hit Rate", fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"], pad=4)
ax_bar.tick_params(axis="both", labelsize=7.5, direction="out", length=2.2, width=0.6)
ax_bar.spines["left"].set_linewidth(0.8)
ax_bar.spines["bottom"].set_linewidth(0.8)
ax_bar.spines["right"].set_visible(False)
ax_bar.spines["top"].set_visible(False)
ax_bar.set_yticks([0, 1, 2])
ax_bar.set_yticklabels(["0", "1×", "2×"], fontsize=7.5)

# ── Headline sentence (embedded in figure, ≤12 words) ────────────────────────
headline = "RetroDiff doubles hit rate over baseline diffusion at fixed compute."
ax_main.text(6.0, 0.62, headline,
             ha="center", va="center", fontsize=10.5, fontweight="bold",
             color=PALETTE["blue"],
             bbox=dict(facecolor=PALETTE["blue_soft"], edgecolor=PALETTE["blue"],
                       linewidth=1.2, boxstyle="round,pad=0.35"),
             zorder=6)

# ── Sub-claims strip (3 claims, small text) ───────────────────────────────────
claims = [
    "+18% binding affinity (Vina)",
    "60% data-efficient training",
    "Scaling law R² > 0.9 (5 sizes)",
]
for i, claim in enumerate(claims):
    ax_main.text(2.2 + i * 3.1, 0.18, claim,
                 ha="center", va="center", fontsize=7.8,
                 color=PALETTE["grey"],
                 bbox=dict(facecolor="#F0F4F8", edgecolor=PALETTE["grey_light"],
                           linewidth=0.7, boxstyle="round,pad=0.22"),
                 zorder=5)

# ── Figure title (top-left, small) ───────────────────────────────────────────
ax_main.text(0.18, 5.72, "RetroDiff", fontsize=13, fontweight="bold",
             color=PALETTE["blue"], va="top", zorder=5)
ax_main.text(0.18, 5.35, "Retrieval-Augmented Diffusion for Structure-Based Drug Design",
             fontsize=8.5, color=PALETTE["grey"], va="top", zorder=5)

plt.savefig("figure.pdf", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300, facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])
plt.savefig("figure.png", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300, facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])
plt.savefig("figure.svg", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300, facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])
print("Saved: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg")

    "grey":        "#767676",     # neutral text / arrows

    "dark":        "#1A2234",     # near-black for labels

}

    )

                   va=kw.pop("va", "center"), **kw)


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Element 1 — Protein Binding Pocket
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pc_x, pc_y = 1.35, FLOW_Y

Aesthetic principles applied (from figure-aesthetic-exemplars skill):
  P1  hue coherence — cool family: teal / slate-blue / mint, one grey neutral
  P2  reduced saturation — fills ~25-40%, strokes ~65-75%
  P3  effective display area — bar axis range from data_min-0.1*span to data_max+0.15*span
  P4  backpack packing — 5 zones + metric strip with no empty cells
  P10 text economy — only load-bearing annotations
  P11 font unification — set once in rcParams, never overridden per element
  P12 layout budget — top 8% reserved for title chrome

    "axes.spines.top":      False,

    "grey_lt":     "#D4D4D4",     # light separator

"""
RetroDiff graphical abstract — CNS-tier (Cell Reports / Nat Commun / Sci Adv)
Pattern: Workflow (Pattern 1) — left-to-right pipeline with embedded headline result
Layout: landscape 2:1, 12×6 inches (= 1200×600 px at 100 dpi; 300 dpi for print)

Aesthetic principles applied (from figure-aesthetic-exemplars skill):
  P1  hue coherence — cool family: teal / slate-blue / mint, one grey neutral
  P2  reduced saturation — fills ~25-40%, strokes ~65-75%
  P3  effective display area — bar axis range from data_min-0.1*span to data_max+0.15*span
  P4  backpack packing — 5 zones + metric strip with no empty cells
  P10 text economy — only load-bearing annotations
  P11 font unification — set once in rcParams, never overridden per element
  P12 layout budget — top 8% reserved for title chrome
  P13 auto-sizing bbox on all labeled text (no fixed-width rectangles)
"""

import matplotlib as mpl
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# ── P11: Font stack locked once, never overridden per element ─────────────────
# Font stack: Arial → Helvetica → DejaVu Sans → Liberation Sans
mpl.rcParams.update({
    "font.family":          "sans-serif",
    "font.sans-serif":      ["Arial", "Helvetica", "DejaVu Sans", "Liberation Sans"],
    "svg.fonttype":         "none",
    "pdf.fonttype":         42,
    "axes.spines.right":    False,
    "axes.spines.top":      False,
    "axes.linewidth":       0.8,
    "legend.frameon":       False,
    "xtick.direction":      "out",
    "ytick.direction":      "out",
})

# ── P1+P2: Cool-family palette, reduced saturation ────────────────────────────
# Primary signal: slate-blue ~70% sat; retrieval: teal ~65%; fills: ~25-35% sat
P = {
    "bg":          "#FFFFFF",
    "blue":        "#2B6CB0",     # slate-blue, ~70% sat — RetroDiff method
    "blue_soft":   "#CCDEED",     # ~25% sat fill
    "teal":        "#2A7A6C",     # teal, ~65% sat — retrieval / output
    "teal_soft":   "#BBDBD5",     # ~30% sat fill
    "mint":        "#4DAF8D",     # mint accent, ~55% sat — metric highlights
    "grey":        "#767676",     # neutral text / arrows
    "grey_lt":     "#D4D4D4",     # light separator
    "dark":        "#1A2234",     # near-black for labels
    # Metric accent colors (cool family, darker shades)
    "m1":          "#1B5E86",     # deep slate — affinity gain
    "m2":          "#1A6A58",     # deep teal — data efficiency
    "m3":          "#2E6B48",     # deep green-teal — scaling law
}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Figure canvas: 12×6 inches, white background
# P12: top 8% reserved for title chrome (FLOW_Y set accordingly)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig = plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6), facecolor=P["bg"])

# Full-canvas overlay for diagram elements
ax = fig.add_axes([0, 0, 1, 1])
ax.set_xlim(0, 12)
ax.set_ylim(0, 6)
ax.axis("off")
ax.set_facecolor(P["bg"])

FLOW_Y = 3.55   # centerline of pipeline elements

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Helpers
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def fbox(ax, cx, cy, w, h, fc, ec, lw=1.5, pad=0.14):
    """Rounded FancyBboxPatch."""
    p = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch(
        (cx - w/2, cy - h/2), w, h,
        boxstyle=f"round,pad={pad}",
        facecolor=fc, edgecolor=ec, linewidth=lw, zorder=3,
    )
    ax.add_patch(p)
    return p


def arrow(ax, x0, x1, y, color=None, lw=1.8):
    """Horizontal flow arrow."""
    color = color or P["grey"]
    ax.annotate("",
        xy=(x1, y), xytext=(x0, y),
        arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=color,
                        lw=lw, mutation_scale=13),
        zorder=5)


def label(ax, x, y, txt, **kw):
    """ax.text with no per-call font override (P11)."""
    return ax.text(x, y, txt, ha=kw.pop("ha", "center"),
                   va=kw.pop("va", "center"), **kw)


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Element 1 — Protein Binding Pocket
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pc_x, pc_y = 1.35, FLOW_Y

# U-shaped pocket (concave top)
theta = np.linspace(np.pi, 2*np.pi, 60)
px = pc_x + 0.60 * np.cos(theta)
py = pc_y - 0.48 + 0.68 * np.sin(theta)
px = np.concatenate([[pc_x - 0.60], px, [pc_x + 0.60]])
py = np.concatenate([[pc_y + 0.58], py, [pc_y + 0.58]])
ax.fill(px, py, color=P["teal_soft"], alpha=0.8, zorder=2)
ax.plot(px, py, color=P["teal"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=3)

# Binding residues (dots inside pocket)
for dx, dy in [(-0.22, -0.08), (0.0, -0.32), (0.22, -0.08), (-0.10, 0.20), (0.16, 0.24)]:
    ax.plot(pc_x + dx, pc_y + dy, "o",
            color=P["teal"], markersize=5.5, zorder=4)

label(ax, pc_x, pc_y - 1.05, "Protein Pocket",
      fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=P["dark"])
label(ax, pc_x, pc_y - 1.38, "binding target",
      fontsize=7.5, color=P["grey"], style="italic")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Arrow 1 → 2
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
arrow(ax, 2.05, 2.60, FLOW_Y)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Element 2 — ChEMBL Retrieval
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
re_x, re_y = 3.30, FLOW_Y
fbox(ax, re_x, re_y, 1.50, 1.82, fc=P["teal_soft"], ec=P["teal"], lw=1.5)

# Database stack icon (3 layered ellipses)
for i, shade in enumerate(["#97CEC7", "#BBDBD5", "#D4EEEA"]):
    yy = re_y + 0.52 - i * 0.26
    e = mpatches.Ellipse((re_x, yy), 0.85, 0.22,
                         facecolor=shade, edgecolor=P["teal"],
                         linewidth=0.9, zorder=4)
    ax.add_patch(e)

label(ax, re_x, re_y - 0.45, "ChEMBL",
      fontsize=9.5, fontweight="bold", color=P["dark"])
label(ax, re_x, re_y - 0.78, "ECFP4 top-k exemplars",
      fontsize=7.5, color=P["grey"], style="italic")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Arrow 2 → 3  (+  "exemplars" label)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
arrow(ax, 4.10, 4.58, FLOW_Y)
label(ax, 4.34, FLOW_Y + 0.24, "exemplars",
      fontsize=7, color=P["grey"])

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Element 3 — RetroDiff Decoder (hero box, slightly larger)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
rd_x, rd_y = 5.88, FLOW_Y
fbox(ax, rd_x, rd_y, 2.10, 2.10, fc=P["blue_soft"], ec=P["blue"], lw=2.2, pad=0.16)

label(ax, rd_x, rd_y + 0.60, "RetroDiff",
      fontsize=12.5, fontweight="bold", color=P["blue"])
label(ax, rd_x, rd_y + 0.20, "Retrieval-Augmented",
      fontsize=8.0, color=P["dark"])
label(ax, rd_x, rd_y - 0.08, "Diffusion Decoder",
      fontsize=8.0, color=P["dark"])

# Stylised denoising squiggle (noisy → clean)
t = np.linspace(0, 2*np.pi, 100)
sq_x = rd_x - 0.60 + 1.20 * (t / (2*np.pi))
sq_y = rd_y - 0.62 + 0.16 * np.sin(5*t) * np.exp(-0.35*t)
ax.plot(sq_x, sq_y, color=P["blue"], linewidth=1.6, alpha=0.75, zorder=4,
        solid_capstyle="round")
# Arrow tip at end of squiggle
ax.annotate("", xy=(sq_x[-1], sq_y[-1]), xytext=(sq_x[-5], sq_y[-5]),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=P["blue"],
                            lw=1.2, mutation_scale=8), zorder=5)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Arrow 3 → 4
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
arrow(ax, 6.99, 7.45, FLOW_Y)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Element 4 — Generated Molecule
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
mol_x, mol_y = 8.18, FLOW_Y
ring_r = 0.40
# Benzene ring
for k in range(6):
    a0 = np.pi/6 + k * np.pi/3
    a1 = np.pi/6 + (k+1) * np.pi/3
    ax.plot([mol_x + ring_r*np.cos(a0), mol_x + ring_r*np.cos(a1)],
            [mol_y + ring_r*np.sin(a0), mol_y + ring_r*np.sin(a1)],
            color=P["blue"], linewidth=2.3, zorder=4, solid_capstyle="round")
# Alternating double bonds
inner_r = 0.23
for k in range(0, 6, 2):
    a0 = np.pi/6 + k * np.pi/3
    a1 = np.pi/6 + (k+1) * np.pi/3
    ax.plot([mol_x + inner_r*np.cos(a0), mol_x + inner_r*np.cos(a1)],
            [mol_y + inner_r*np.sin(a0), mol_y + inner_r*np.sin(a1)],
            color=P["blue"], linewidth=1.2, alpha=0.55, zorder=4)
# Substituent chain (top-right)
ex1 = mol_x + ring_r * np.cos(np.pi/6)
ey1 = mol_y + ring_r * np.sin(np.pi/6)
ex2, ey2 = ex1 + 0.32, ey1 + 0.28
ex3, ey3 = ex2 + 0.32, ey2 - 0.10
ax.plot([ex1, ex2], [ey1, ey2], color=P["blue"], lw=2.1, zorder=4)
ax.plot([ex2, ex3], [ey2, ey3], color=P["blue"], lw=2.1, zorder=4)
# OH substituent (bottom-right)  — use teal for contrast (still cool family)
ox1 = mol_x + ring_r * np.cos(-np.pi/6)
oy1 = mol_y + ring_r * np.sin(-np.pi/6)
ax.plot([ox1, ox1 + 0.34], [oy1, oy1 - 0.28],
        color=P["teal"], lw=2.0, zorder=4)
# P13: auto-sizing bbox for "OH" label
ax.text(ox1 + 0.42, oy1 - 0.36, "OH",
        ha="left", va="center", fontsize=7.5,
        fontweight="bold", color=P["teal"], zorder=5)

label(ax, mol_x, mol_y - 1.00, "Generated Molecule",
      fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=P["dark"])
label(ax, mol_x, mol_y - 1.33, "novel drug candidate",
      fontsize=7.5, color=P["grey"], style="italic")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ax_bar = fig.add_axes([0.812, 0.225, 0.168, 0.575])
ax_bar.set_facecolor(P["bg"])

bar_vals = [1.0, 2.0]
bar_cols = [P["grey_lt"], P["blue"]]
bar_ecs  = [P["grey"],    P["blue"]]
ax_bar.bar(["Baseline\nDiffusion", "RetroDiff"], bar_vals,
           color=bar_cols, edgecolor=bar_ecs, linewidth=1.2, width=0.52, zorder=3)

                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=P["blue"],

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import matplotlib.patheffects as pe
import numpy as np

# Font stack: Arial → Helvetica → DejaVu Sans → Liberation Sans
# Do NOT override per element — all text inherits from here.
mpl.rcParams.update({
    "font.family": "sans-serif",
    "font.sans-serif": ["Arial", "Helvetica", "DejaVu Sans", "Liberation Sans"],
    "svg.fonttype": "none",
    "pdf.fonttype": 42,
    "axes.spines.right": False,
    "axes.spines.top": False,
    "axes.linewidth": 0.8,
    "legend.frameon": False,
})

# ── Palette (cool family, reduced saturation, P1+P2 compliant) ──────────────
PALETTE = {
    "bg":          "#FFFFFF",
    "panel_bg":    "#F4F7FB",   # near-white blue tint for boxes
    "blue":        "#2B6CB0",   # primary signal — RetroDiff
    "blue_soft":   "#BDD7EE",   # soft fill for boxes
    "teal":        "#2C8C7C",   # retrieval mechanism
    "teal_soft":   "#B8DDD8",
    "amber":       "#B07D2F",   # baseline / comparison
    "amber_soft":  "#F3E3C5",
    "grey":        "#767676",
    "grey_light":  "#D8D8D8",
    "black":       "#1A1A2E",
    "headline":    "#2B6CB0",
}

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6), facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])

# ── Layout: 5 visual elements across a 2:1 canvas ───────────────────────────
# [Protein pocket] → [ChEMBL retrieval] → [RetroDiff decoder] → [Generated mol] → [Headline bar]
# We use axes coordinates for the diagram elements, plus one real axes for the bar chart.

ax_main = fig.add_axes([0, 0, 1, 1])  # full-canvas drawing surface
ax_main.set_xlim(0, 12)
ax_main.set_ylim(0, 6)
ax_main.axis("off")
ax_main.set_facecolor(PALETTE["bg"])

# ── Helper: rounded box with label ──────────────────────────────────────────
def draw_box(ax, cx, cy, w, h, label, sublabel, fill, edge, fontsize=9.5):
    box = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch(
        (cx - w/2, cy - h/2), w, h,
        boxstyle="round,pad=0.12",
        facecolor=fill, edgecolor=edge, linewidth=1.4,
        zorder=3,
    )
    ax.add_patch(box)
    ax.text(cx, cy + 0.12, label, ha="center", va="center",
            fontsize=fontsize, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"], zorder=4)
    if sublabel:
        ax.text(cx, cy - 0.38, sublabel, ha="center", va="center",
                fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["grey"], zorder=4)

def draw_arrow(ax, x0, x1, y, color, lw=2.0):
    ax.annotate("",
        xy=(x1, y), xytext=(x0, y),
        arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=color, lw=lw,
                        mutation_scale=14),
        zorder=2)

# ── Element 1: Protein binding pocket ───────────────────────────────────────
# Stylised pocket icon using a concave polygon
pocket_cx, pocket_cy = 1.35, 3.5
pocket_w, pocket_h = 1.55, 2.0

# Draw pocket as a U-shape (open top)
theta = np.linspace(np.pi, 2*np.pi, 60)
px = pocket_cx + 0.62 * np.cos(theta)
py = pocket_cy - 0.55 + 0.72 * np.sin(theta)
# Close the U at the top
px = np.concatenate([[pocket_cx - 0.62], px, [pocket_cx + 0.62]])
py = np.concatenate([[pocket_cy + 0.55], py, [pocket_cy + 0.55]])
ax_main.fill(px, py, color=PALETTE["teal_soft"], alpha=0.85, zorder=2)
ax_main.plot(px, py, color=PALETTE["teal"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=3)

# Small dots inside pocket = binding residues
for dx, dy in [(-0.25, -0.1), (0.0, -0.35), (0.25, -0.1), (-0.12, 0.18), (0.18, 0.22)]:
    ax_main.plot(pocket_cx + dx, pocket_cy + dy, "o",
                 color=PALETTE["teal"], markersize=5, zorder=4)

ax_main.text(pocket_cx, pocket_cy - 1.18, "Protein Pocket", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"])
ax_main.text(pocket_cx, pocket_cy - 1.52, "binding target", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["grey"])

# ── Arrow 1 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 2.18, 2.72, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 2: ChEMBL retrieval box ─────────────────────────────────────────
draw_box(ax_main, 3.35, 3.5, 1.55, 1.85,
         "ChEMBL", "ECFP4 top-k retrieval",
         PALETTE["teal_soft"], PALETTE["teal"], fontsize=9.5)

# Small molecule icons inside the box (3 hexagons)
for i, (dx, dy) in enumerate([(-0.38, -0.05), (0.0, 0.18), (0.38, -0.05)]):
    hx = 3.35 + dx
    hy = 3.5 + dy - 0.28
    hex_pts = [(hx + 0.18*np.cos(np.pi/6 + k*np.pi/3),
                hy + 0.18*np.sin(np.pi/6 + k*np.pi/3)) for k in range(6)]
    hex_pts.append(hex_pts[0])
    hxs, hys = zip(*hex_pts)
    ax_main.fill(hxs, hys, color=PALETTE["teal"], alpha=0.35, zorder=4)
    ax_main.plot(hxs, hys, color=PALETTE["teal"], linewidth=1.0, zorder=5)

# ── Arrow 2 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 4.18, 4.72, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 3: RetroDiff decoder (hero box) ──────────────────────────────────
# Larger box — the method itself
rd_cx, rd_cy = 5.85, 3.5
rd_w, rd_h = 2.0, 2.2
box_rd = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch(
    (rd_cx - rd_w/2, rd_cy - rd_h/2), rd_w, rd_h,
    boxstyle="round,pad=0.15",
    facecolor=PALETTE["blue_soft"], edgecolor=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.2,
    zorder=3,
)
ax_main.add_patch(box_rd)
ax_main.text(rd_cx, rd_cy + 0.55, "RetroDiff", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=12, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["blue"], zorder=4)
ax_main.text(rd_cx, rd_cy + 0.12, "Retrieval-Augmented", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=8, color=PALETTE["black"], zorder=4)
ax_main.text(rd_cx, rd_cy - 0.18, "Diffusion Decoder", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=8, color=PALETTE["black"], zorder=4)

# Diffusion noise squiggle (stylised)
t = np.linspace(0, 2*np.pi, 80)
noise_x = rd_cx - 0.55 + 1.1 * (t / (2*np.pi))
noise_y = rd_cy - 0.62 + 0.18 * np.sin(4*t) * np.exp(-0.3*t)
ax_main.plot(noise_x, noise_y, color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=1.5,
             alpha=0.7, zorder=4)
ax_main.annotate("", xy=(noise_x[-1], noise_y[-1]),
                 xytext=(noise_x[-4], noise_y[-4]),
                 arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=PALETTE["blue"],
                                 lw=1.2, mutation_scale=8), zorder=5)

# ── Arrow 3 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 6.92, 7.42, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 4: Generated molecule ────────────────────────────────────────────
mol_cx, mol_cy = 8.2, 3.5
# Draw a stylised molecule (benzene ring + substituent)
ring_r = 0.38
for k in range(6):
    a0 = np.pi/6 + k * np.pi/3
    a1 = np.pi/6 + (k+1) * np.pi/3
    ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r*np.cos(a0), mol_cx + ring_r*np.cos(a1)],
                 [mol_cy + ring_r*np.sin(a0), mol_cy + ring_r*np.sin(a1)],
                 color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.2, zorder=4)
# Alternating double bonds (inner ring)
inner_r = 0.22
for k in range(0, 6, 2):
    a0 = np.pi/6 + k * np.pi/3
    a1 = np.pi/6 + (k+1) * np.pi/3
    ax_main.plot([mol_cx + inner_r*np.cos(a0), mol_cx + inner_r*np.cos(a1)],
                 [mol_cy + inner_r*np.sin(a0), mol_cy + inner_r*np.sin(a1)],
                 color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=1.2, alpha=0.6, zorder=4)
# Substituent chain
ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r, mol_cx + ring_r + 0.32],
             [mol_cy, mol_cy + 0.28], color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=4)
ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r + 0.32, mol_cx + ring_r + 0.64],
             [mol_cy + 0.28, mol_cy], color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=4)
# OH group
ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r, mol_cx + ring_r + 0.32],
             [mol_cy, mol_cy - 0.30], color=PALETTE["teal"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=4)
ax_main.text(mol_cx + ring_r + 0.38, mol_cy - 0.38, "OH",
             fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["teal"], fontweight="bold", zorder=5)

ax_main.text(mol_cx, mol_cy - 0.95, "Generated Molecule", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"])
ax_main.text(mol_cx, mol_cy - 1.28, "novel drug candidate", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["grey"])

# ── Arrow 4 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 8.98, 9.42, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 5: Headline result bar chart ─────────────────────────────────────
ax_bar = fig.add_axes([0.815, 0.22, 0.165, 0.58])
ax_bar.set_facecolor(PALETTE["bg"])

methods = ["Baseline\nDiffusion", "RetroDiff"]
hit_rates = [1.0, 2.0]   # relative; RetroDiff doubles hit rate
colors = [PALETTE["grey_light"], PALETTE["blue"]]
bars = ax_bar.bar(methods, hit_rates, color=colors, width=0.55,
                  edgecolor=[PALETTE["grey"], PALETTE["blue"]], linewidth=1.2)

# Annotate the gain
ax_bar.annotate("", xy=(1, 2.0), xytext=(1, 1.0),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=PALETTE["blue"],
                                lw=1.4, mutation_scale=10))
ax_bar.text(1.28, 1.5, "×2", fontsize=11, fontweight="bold",
            color=PALETTE["blue"], va="center")

ax_bar.set_ylim(0, 2.45)
ax_bar.set_ylabel("Hit Rate (rel.)", fontsize=8, color=PALETTE["grey"])
ax_bar.set_title("Hit Rate", fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"], pad=4)
ax_bar.tick_params(axis="both", labelsize=7.5, direction="out", length=2.2, width=0.6)
ax_bar.spines["left"].set_linewidth(0.8)
ax_bar.spines["bottom"].set_linewidth(0.8)
ax_bar.spines["right"].set_visible(False)
ax_bar.spines["top"].set_visible(False)
ax_bar.set_yticks([0, 1, 2])
ax_bar.set_yticklabels(["0", "1×", "2×"], fontsize=7.5)

# ── Headline sentence (embedded in figure, ≤12 words) ────────────────────────
headline = "RetroDiff doubles hit rate over baseline diffusion at fixed compute."
ax_main.text(6.0, 0.62, headline,
             ha="center", va="center", fontsize=10.5, fontweight="bold",
             color=PALETTE["blue"],
             bbox=dict(facecolor=PALETTE["blue_soft"], edgecolor=PALETTE["blue"],
                       linewidth=1.2, boxstyle="round,pad=0.35"),
             zorder=6)

# ── Sub-claims strip (3 claims, small text) ───────────────────────────────────
claims = [
    "+18% binding affinity (Vina)",
    "60% data-efficient training",
    "Scaling law R² > 0.9 (5 sizes)",
]
for i, claim in enumerate(claims):
    ax_main.text(2.2 + i * 3.1, 0.18, claim,
                 ha="center", va="center", fontsize=7.8,
                 color=PALETTE["grey"],
                 bbox=dict(facecolor="#F0F4F8", edgecolor=PALETTE["grey_light"],
                           linewidth=0.7, boxstyle="round,pad=0.22"),
                 zorder=5)

# ── Figure title (top-left, small) ───────────────────────────────────────────
ax_main.text(0.18, 5.72, "RetroDiff", fontsize=13, fontweight="bold",
             color=PALETTE["blue"], va="top", zorder=5)
ax_main.text(0.18, 5.35, "Retrieval-Augmented Diffusion for Structure-Based Drug Design",
             fontsize=8.5, color=PALETTE["grey"], va="top", zorder=5)

plt.savefig("figure.pdf", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300, facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])
plt.savefig("figure.png", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300, facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])
plt.savefig("figure.svg", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300, facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])
print("Saved: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg")

"""
RetroDiff graphical abstract — CNS-tier (Cell Reports / Nat Commun / Sci Adv)
Pattern: Workflow (Pattern 1) — left-to-right pipeline with headline result
Layout: landscape 2:1, ~12×6 inches (1200×600 px at 100 dpi)
"""

import matplotlib as mpl
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import matplotlib.patheffects as pe
import numpy as np

# Font stack: Arial → Helvetica → DejaVu Sans → Liberation Sans
# Do NOT override per element — all text inherits from here.
mpl.rcParams.update({
    "font.family": "sans-serif",
    "font.sans-serif": ["Arial", "Helvetica", "DejaVu Sans", "Liberation Sans"],
    "svg.fonttype": "none",
    "pdf.fonttype": 42,
    "axes.spines.right": False,
    "axes.spines.top": False,
    "axes.linewidth": 0.8,
    "legend.frameon": False,
})

# ── Palette (cool family, reduced saturation, P1+P2 compliant) ──────────────
PALETTE = {
    "bg":          "#FFFFFF",
    "panel_bg":    "#F4F7FB",   # near-white blue tint for boxes
    "blue":        "#2B6CB0",   # primary signal — RetroDiff
    "blue_soft":   "#BDD7EE",   # soft fill for boxes
    "teal":        "#2C8C7C",   # retrieval mechanism
    "teal_soft":   "#B8DDD8",
    "amber":       "#B07D2F",   # baseline / comparison
    "amber_soft":  "#F3E3C5",
    "grey":        "#767676",
    "grey_light":  "#D8D8D8",
    "black":       "#1A1A2E",
    "headline":    "#2B6CB0",
}

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6), facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])

# ── Layout: 5 visual elements across a 2:1 canvas ───────────────────────────
# [Protein pocket] → [ChEMBL retrieval] → [RetroDiff decoder] → [Generated mol] → [Headline bar]
# We use axes coordinates for the diagram elements, plus one real axes for the bar chart.

ax_main = fig.add_axes([0, 0, 1, 1])  # full-canvas drawing surface
ax_main.set_xlim(0, 12)
ax_main.set_ylim(0, 6)
ax_main.axis("off")
ax_main.set_facecolor(PALETTE["bg"])

# ── Helper: rounded box with label ──────────────────────────────────────────
def draw_box(ax, cx, cy, w, h, label, sublabel, fill, edge, fontsize=9.5):
    box = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch(
        (cx - w/2, cy - h/2), w, h,
        boxstyle="round,pad=0.12",
        facecolor=fill, edgecolor=edge, linewidth=1.4,
        zorder=3,
    )
    ax.add_patch(box)
    ax.text(cx, cy + 0.12, label, ha="center", va="center",
            fontsize=fontsize, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"], zorder=4)
    if sublabel:
        ax.text(cx, cy - 0.38, sublabel, ha="center", va="center",
                fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["grey"], zorder=4)

def draw_arrow(ax, x0, x1, y, color, lw=2.0):
    ax.annotate("",
        xy=(x1, y), xytext=(x0, y),
        arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=color, lw=lw,
                        mutation_scale=14),
        zorder=2)

# ── Element 1: Protein binding pocket ───────────────────────────────────────
# Stylised pocket icon using a concave polygon
pocket_cx, pocket_cy = 1.35, 3.5
pocket_w, pocket_h = 1.55, 2.0

# Draw pocket as a U-shape (open top)
theta = np.linspace(np.pi, 2*np.pi, 60)
px = pocket_cx + 0.62 * np.cos(theta)
py = pocket_cy - 0.55 + 0.72 * np.sin(theta)
# Close the U at the top
px = np.concatenate([[pocket_cx - 0.62], px, [pocket_cx + 0.62]])
py = np.concatenate([[pocket_cy + 0.55], py, [pocket_cy + 0.55]])
ax_main.fill(px, py, color=PALETTE["teal_soft"], alpha=0.85, zorder=2)
ax_main.plot(px, py, color=PALETTE["teal"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=3)

# Small dots inside pocket = binding residues
for dx, dy in [(-0.25, -0.1), (0.0, -0.35), (0.25, -0.1), (-0.12, 0.18), (0.18, 0.22)]:
    ax_main.plot(pocket_cx + dx, pocket_cy + dy, "o",
                 color=PALETTE["teal"], markersize=5, zorder=4)

ax_main.text(pocket_cx, pocket_cy - 1.18, "Protein Pocket", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"])
ax_main.text(pocket_cx, pocket_cy - 1.52, "binding target", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["grey"])

# ── Arrow 1 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 2.18, 2.72, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 2: ChEMBL retrieval box ─────────────────────────────────────────
draw_box(ax_main, 3.35, 3.5, 1.55, 1.85,
         "ChEMBL", "ECFP4 top-k retrieval",
         PALETTE["teal_soft"], PALETTE["teal"], fontsize=9.5)

# Small molecule icons inside the box (3 hexagons)
for i, (dx, dy) in enumerate([(-0.38, -0.05), (0.0, 0.18), (0.38, -0.05)]):
    hx = 3.35 + dx
    hy = 3.5 + dy - 0.28
    hex_pts = [(hx + 0.18*np.cos(np.pi/6 + k*np.pi/3),
                hy + 0.18*np.sin(np.pi/6 + k*np.pi/3)) for k in range(6)]
    hex_pts.append(hex_pts[0])
    hxs, hys = zip(*hex_pts)
    ax_main.fill(hxs, hys, color=PALETTE["teal"], alpha=0.35, zorder=4)
    ax_main.plot(hxs, hys, color=PALETTE["teal"], linewidth=1.0, zorder=5)

# ── Arrow 2 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 4.18, 4.72, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 3: RetroDiff decoder (hero box) ──────────────────────────────────
# Larger box — the method itself
rd_cx, rd_cy = 5.85, 3.5
rd_w, rd_h = 2.0, 2.2
box_rd = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch(
    (rd_cx - rd_w/2, rd_cy - rd_h/2), rd_w, rd_h,
    boxstyle="round,pad=0.15",
    facecolor=PALETTE["blue_soft"], edgecolor=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.2,
    zorder=3,
)
ax_main.add_patch(box_rd)
ax_main.text(rd_cx, rd_cy + 0.55, "RetroDiff", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=12, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["blue"], zorder=4)
ax_main.text(rd_cx, rd_cy + 0.12, "Retrieval-Augmented", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=8, color=PALETTE["black"], zorder=4)
ax_main.text(rd_cx, rd_cy - 0.18, "Diffusion Decoder", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=8, color=PALETTE["black"], zorder=4)

# Diffusion noise squiggle (stylised)
t = np.linspace(0, 2*np.pi, 80)
noise_x = rd_cx - 0.55 + 1.1 * (t / (2*np.pi))
noise_y = rd_cy - 0.62 + 0.18 * np.sin(4*t) * np.exp(-0.3*t)
ax_main.plot(noise_x, noise_y, color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=1.5,
             alpha=0.7, zorder=4)
ax_main.annotate("", xy=(noise_x[-1], noise_y[-1]),
                 xytext=(noise_x[-4], noise_y[-4]),
                 arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=PALETTE["blue"],
                                 lw=1.2, mutation_scale=8), zorder=5)

# ── Arrow 3 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 6.92, 7.42, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 4: Generated molecule ────────────────────────────────────────────
mol_cx, mol_cy = 8.2, 3.5
# Draw a stylised molecule (benzene ring + substituent)
ring_r = 0.38
for k in range(6):
    a0 = np.pi/6 + k * np.pi/3
    a1 = np.pi/6 + (k+1) * np.pi/3
    ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r*np.cos(a0), mol_cx + ring_r*np.cos(a1)],
                 [mol_cy + ring_r*np.sin(a0), mol_cy + ring_r*np.sin(a1)],
                 color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.2, zorder=4)
# Alternating double bonds (inner ring)
inner_r = 0.22
for k in range(0, 6, 2):
    a0 = np.pi/6 + k * np.pi/3
    a1 = np.pi/6 + (k+1) * np.pi/3
    ax_main.plot([mol_cx + inner_r*np.cos(a0), mol_cx + inner_r*np.cos(a1)],
                 [mol_cy + inner_r*np.sin(a0), mol_cy + inner_r*np.sin(a1)],
                 color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=1.2, alpha=0.6, zorder=4)
# Substituent chain
ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r, mol_cx + ring_r + 0.32],
             [mol_cy, mol_cy + 0.28], color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=4)
ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r + 0.32, mol_cx + ring_r + 0.64],
             [mol_cy + 0.28, mol_cy], color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=4)
# OH group
ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r, mol_cx + ring_r + 0.32],
             [mol_cy, mol_cy - 0.30], color=PALETTE["teal"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=4)
ax_main.text(mol_cx + ring_r + 0.38, mol_cy - 0.38, "OH",
             fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["teal"], fontweight="bold", zorder=5)

ax_main.text(mol_cx, mol_cy - 0.95, "Generated Molecule", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"])
ax_main.text(mol_cx, mol_cy - 1.28, "novel drug candidate", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["grey"])

# ── Arrow 4 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 8.98, 9.42, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 5: Headline result bar chart ─────────────────────────────────────
ax_bar = fig.add_axes([0.815, 0.22, 0.165, 0.58])
ax_bar.set_facecolor(PALETTE["bg"])

methods = ["Baseline\nDiffusion", "RetroDiff"]
hit_rates = [1.0, 2.0]   # relative; RetroDiff doubles hit rate
colors = [PALETTE["grey_light"], PALETTE["blue"]]
bars = ax_bar.bar(methods, hit_rates, color=colors, width=0.55,
                  edgecolor=[PALETTE["grey"], PALETTE["blue"]], linewidth=1.2)

# Annotate the gain
ax_bar.annotate("", xy=(1, 2.0), xytext=(1, 1.0),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=PALETTE["blue"],
                                lw=1.4, mutation_scale=10))
ax_bar.text(1.28, 1.5, "×2", fontsize=11, fontweight="bold",
            color=PALETTE["blue"], va="center")

ax_bar.set_ylim(0, 2.45)
ax_bar.set_ylabel("Hit Rate (rel.)", fontsize=8, color=PALETTE["grey"])
ax_bar.set_title("Hit Rate", fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"], pad=4)
ax_bar.tick_params(axis="both", labelsize=7.5, direction="out", length=2.2, width=0.6)
ax_bar.spines["left"].set_linewidth(0.8)
ax_bar.spines["bottom"].set_linewidth(0.8)
ax_bar.spines["right"].set_visible(False)
ax_bar.spines["top"].set_visible(False)
ax_bar.set_yticks([0, 1, 2])
ax_bar.set_yticklabels(["0", "1×", "2×"], fontsize=7.5)

# ── Headline sentence (embedded in figure, ≤12 words) ────────────────────────
headline = "RetroDiff doubles hit rate over baseline diffusion at fixed compute."
ax_main.text(6.0, 0.62, headline,
             ha="center", va="center", fontsize=10.5, fontweight="bold",
             color=PALETTE["blue"],
             bbox=dict(facecolor=PALETTE["blue_soft"], edgecolor=PALETTE["blue"],
                       linewidth=1.2, boxstyle="round,pad=0.35"),
             zorder=6)

# ── Sub-claims strip (3 claims, small text) ───────────────────────────────────
claims = [
    "+18% binding affinity (Vina)",
    "60% data-efficient training",
    "Scaling law R² > 0.9 (5 sizes)",
]
for i, claim in enumerate(claims):
    ax_main.text(2.2 + i * 3.1, 0.18, claim,
                 ha="center", va="center", fontsize=7.8,
                 color=PALETTE["grey"],
                 bbox=dict(facecolor="#F0F4F8", edgecolor=PALETTE["grey_light"],
                           linewidth=0.7, boxstyle="round,pad=0.22"),
                 zorder=5)

# ── Figure title (top-left, small) ───────────────────────────────────────────
ax_main.text(0.18, 5.72, "RetroDiff", fontsize=13, fontweight="bold",
             color=PALETTE["blue"], va="top", zorder=5)
ax_main.text(0.18, 5.35, "Retrieval-Augmented Diffusion for Structure-Based Drug Design",
             fontsize=8.5, color=PALETTE["grey"], va="top", zorder=5)

plt.savefig("figure.pdf", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300, facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])
plt.savefig("figure.png", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300, facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])
plt.savefig("figure.svg", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300, facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])
print("Saved: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg")

    zorder=3,
)
ax_main.add_patch(box_rd)
ax_main.text(rd_cx, rd_cy + 0.55, "RetroDiff", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=12, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["blue"], zorder=4)
ax_main.text(rd_cx, rd_cy + 0.12, "Retrieval-Augmented", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=8, color=PALETTE["black"], zorder=4)
ax_main.text(rd_cx, rd_cy - 0.18, "Diffusion Decoder", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=8, color=PALETTE["black"], zorder=4)

# Diffusion noise squiggle (stylised)
t = np.linspace(0, 2*np.pi, 80)
noise_x = rd_cx - 0.55 + 1.1 * (t / (2*np.pi))
noise_y = rd_cy - 0.62 + 0.18 * np.sin(4*t) * np.exp(-0.3*t)
ax_main.plot(noise_x, noise_y, color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=1.5,
             alpha=0.7, zorder=4)
ax_main.annotate("", xy=(noise_x[-1], noise_y[-1]),
                 xytext=(noise_x[-4], noise_y[-4]),
                 arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=PALETTE["blue"],
                                 lw=1.2, mutation_scale=8), zorder=5)

# ── Arrow 3 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 6.92, 7.42, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 4: Generated molecule ────────────────────────────────────────────
mol_cx, mol_cy = 8.2, 3.5
# Draw a stylised molecule (benzene ring + substituent)
ring_r = 0.38
for k in range(6):
    a0 = np.pi/6 + k * np.pi/3
    a1 = np.pi/6 + (k+1) * np.pi/3
    ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r*np.cos(a0), mol_cx + ring_r*np.cos(a1)],
                 [mol_cy + ring_r*np.sin(a0), mol_cy + ring_r*np.sin(a1)],
                 color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.2, zorder=4)
# Alternating double bonds (inner ring)
inner_r = 0.22
for k in range(0, 6, 2):
    a0 = np.pi/6 + k * np.pi/3
    a1 = np.pi/6 + (k+1) * np.pi/3
    ax_main.plot([mol_cx + inner_r*np.cos(a0), mol_cx + inner_r*np.cos(a1)],
                 [mol_cy + inner_r*np.sin(a0), mol_cy + inner_r*np.sin(a1)],
                 color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=1.2, alpha=0.6, zorder=4)
# Substituent chain
ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r, mol_cx + ring_r + 0.32],
             [mol_cy, mol_cy + 0.28], color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=4)
ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r + 0.32, mol_cx + ring_r + 0.64],
             [mol_cy + 0.28, mol_cy], color=PALETTE["blue"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=4)
# OH group
ax_main.plot([mol_cx + ring_r, mol_cx + ring_r + 0.32],
             [mol_cy, mol_cy - 0.30], color=PALETTE["teal"], linewidth=2.0, zorder=4)
ax_main.text(mol_cx + ring_r + 0.38, mol_cy - 0.38, "OH",
             fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["teal"], fontweight="bold", zorder=5)

ax_main.text(mol_cx, mol_cy - 0.95, "Generated Molecule", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"])
ax_main.text(mol_cx, mol_cy - 1.28, "novel drug candidate", ha="center", va="center",
             fontsize=7.5, color=PALETTE["grey"])

# ── Arrow 4 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draw_arrow(ax_main, 8.98, 9.42, 3.5, PALETTE["grey"], lw=1.8)

# ── Element 5: Headline result bar chart ─────────────────────────────────────
ax_bar = fig.add_axes([0.815, 0.22, 0.165, 0.58])
ax_bar.set_facecolor(PALETTE["bg"])

methods = ["Baseline\nDiffusion", "RetroDiff"]
hit_rates = [1.0, 2.0]   # relative; RetroDiff doubles hit rate
colors = [PALETTE["grey_light"], PALETTE["blue"]]
bars = ax_bar.bar(methods, hit_rates, color=colors, width=0.55,
                  edgecolor=[PALETTE["grey"], PALETTE["blue"]], linewidth=1.2)

# Annotate the gain
ax_bar.annotate("", xy=(1, 2.0), xytext=(1, 1.0),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle="-|>", color=PALETTE["blue"],
                                lw=1.4, mutation_scale=10))
ax_bar.text(1.28, 1.5, "×2", fontsize=11, fontweight="bold",
            color=PALETTE["blue"], va="center")

ax_bar.set_ylim(0, 2.45)
ax_bar.set_ylabel("Hit Rate (rel.)", fontsize=8, color=PALETTE["grey"])
ax_bar.set_title("Hit Rate", fontsize=9, fontweight="bold", color=PALETTE["black"], pad=4)
ax_bar.tick_params(axis="both", labelsize=7.5, direction="out", length=2.2, width=0.6)
ax_bar.spines["left"].set_linewidth(0.8)
ax_bar.spines["bottom"].set_linewidth(0.8)
ax_bar.spines["right"].set_visible(False)
ax_bar.spines["top"].set_visible(False)
ax_bar.set_yticks([0, 1, 2])
ax_bar.set_yticklabels(["0", "1×", "2×"], fontsize=7.5)

# ── Headline sentence (embedded in figure, ≤12 words) ────────────────────────
headline = "RetroDiff doubles hit rate over baseline diffusion at fixed compute."
ax_main.text(6.0, 0.62, headline,
             ha="center", va="center", fontsize=10.5, fontweight="bold",
             color=PALETTE["blue"],
             bbox=dict(facecolor=PALETTE["blue_soft"], edgecolor=PALETTE["blue"],
                       linewidth=1.2, boxstyle="round,pad=0.35"),
             zorder=6)

# ── Sub-claims strip (3 claims, small text) ───────────────────────────────────
claims = [
    "+18% binding affinity (Vina)",
    "60% data-efficient training",
    "Scaling law R² > 0.9 (5 sizes)",
]
for i, claim in enumerate(claims):
    ax_main.text(2.2 + i * 3.1, 0.18, claim,
                 ha="center", va="center", fontsize=7.8,
                 color=PALETTE["grey"],
                 bbox=dict(facecolor="#F0F4F8", edgecolor=PALETTE["grey_light"],
                           linewidth=0.7, boxstyle="round,pad=0.22"),
                 zorder=5)

# ── Figure title (top-left, small) ───────────────────────────────────────────
ax_main.text(0.18, 5.72, "RetroDiff", fontsize=13, fontweight="bold",
             color=PALETTE["blue"], va="top", zorder=5)
ax_main.text(0.18, 5.35, "Retrieval-Augmented Diffusion for Structure-Based Drug Design",
             fontsize=8.5, color=PALETTE["grey"], va="top", zorder=5)

plt.savefig("figure.pdf", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300, facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])
plt.savefig("figure.png", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300, facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])
plt.savefig("figure.svg", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300, facecolor=PALETTE["bg"])
print("Saved: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg")
